summary: P1.7 Payment Choke-Point Telemetry + Exit-Intent Survey + Paid-Funnel Session-Replay-Lite - All tests PASSED. Backend: 29/29 pytest tests passed (revenue-conversion new metrics, funnel track new events, checkout-exit-survey POST/GET, paid-funnel-sessions). Frontend: CheckoutExitSurvey modal working (5 options, 'other' textarea, sessionStorage flag prevents re-trigger), Admin dashboard shows 4 cashfree choke-point cards + checkout-exit-survey-summary + paid-funnel-sessions panels. P0/P1 features verified (no regression): instant demo, mobile sticky Video chip ₹29, video-cta-variants-table, purchase-survey-summary.

tests: TestPaidFunnelSessions::test_paid_funnel_sessions_structure - PASS (session_id, user_id, device_type, browser, country, first_step, last_step, intent_ts, event_count, outcome, timeline)

details: All 5 options present: price, payment_failed, needed_more_trust, just_browsing, other
sessionStorage flag 'checkout_exit_survey_shown_once' set to '1' after submission
Survey does NOT show again on re-navigation (sessionStorage prevents re-trigger)
Shows 'Why they left checkout' with answer breakdown
Shows paid-intent sessions with timeline for manual replay
Login page loads with from=experience parameter
login_page_loaded event fires with meta.from='experience' and meta.paid_intent=true
video-cta-variants-table still present in admin dashboard
purchase-survey-summary panel still present in admin dashboard

response_structure.sessions: [{session_id, user_id, device_type, browser, country, first_step, last_step, intent_ts, event_count, outcome, timeline}]

critical_code_review_comments: P1.7 Payment Choke-Point Telemetry fully implemented - 4 new metrics in revenue-conversion endpoint
CheckoutExitSurvey modal correctly triggered on /billing?from=experience after ~1.2s delay
sessionStorage flag 'checkout_exit_survey_shown_once' prevents survey from showing multiple times per session
Admin dashboard shows 4 cashfree choke-point cards with percentages
Paid-funnel-sessions endpoint returns session timeline for manual replay
Note: Math anomalies in revenue-conversion (e.g., checkout_to_payment_pct=300%) are EXPECTED per agent context - early paid users predate checkout_started instrumentation

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all P1.7 features verified, P0/P1 no regression)

seed_data_creation: Checkout exit survey responses created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1.7 Payment Choke-Point Telemetry verified. Key features: (1) GET /api/funnel/revenue-conversion now includes login_redirect_dropoff_pct, cashfree_opened_pct, cashfree_success_pct, cashfree_dropoff_pct in metrics and payment_started_sessions, login_loaded_sessions, cashfree_open_sessions, cashfree_fail_sessions in totals, (2) POST /api/funnel/track accepts new events: login_page_loaded, cashfree_checkout_opened, cashfree_checkout_failed, checkout_exit_survey_*, (3) CheckoutExitSurvey modal on /billing?from=experience with 5 options + sessionStorage flag, (4) Admin dashboard at /app/admin/activation shows 4 cashfree choke cards + checkout-exit-survey-summary + paid-funnel-sessions panels. P0/P1 features verified - no regression.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no issues found. All P1.7 features working as specified.
